name: Hybrid Cloud Multiple Login Failures from Same Source
notes: This rule triggers when there are multiple authentication failures to virtualization or cloud systems from the same source address.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud, BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Login Failure
when at least 10 events are seen with the same Source Address in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 10 events are seen with the same Source Address in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Hybrid Cloud Multiple Login Failures from Same Source on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud, BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Login Failure
AND when at least 10 events are seen with the same Source Address in 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Hybrid Cloud Multiple Login Failures from Same Source
Event description: Detects when there are multiple authentication failures to virtualization or cloud systems from the same source address.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
